Ah, Connor McDavid. He played for our local team before going to the NHL, and went to high school here. Was always away from class practicing, and basically single-handedly led our local team to championships. Cousin of mine went to high school with him and said he was actually a pretty great guy, too. We all were kinda sad that he didn’t stay somewhat local going to the Penguins, but it is what it is.
